name: Options screen - gamepad push/pop roundtrip
description: Full pad journey, both pop paths: from the main menu, Down lands on Button_Options (flip + nav), A pushes WBP_OptionsScreen whose DesiredFocusWidget (Master_Volume_Slider row) relays focus to its inner AnalogSlider; Down/Down reaches Button_Back, A pops, focus auto-restores to Button_Options. Then A pushes again and gamepad B pops via the back-handler action binding (bIsBackHandler + the DefaultBackAction row from DT_UIInputActions via BP_UIInputData, configured in DefaultGame.ini CommonInputSettings.InputData). Requires CommonUI.ShouldVirtualAcceptSimulateMouseButton=0 (DefaultEngine.ini) - with the engine default, gamepad A becomes a simulated mouse click at the cursor and never reaches the focused button.

steps.note: desired-target row on the focus path
row relays focus to its inner AnalogSlider
bAutoRestoreFocus returns focus to the pre-push widget
pushed again for the B-button pop leg
gamepad B pops via the bound DefaultBackAction (DT_UIInputActions: Back)
